message:
chore: close completed beads (DIAL-7rm, DIAL-dax, DIAL-blk)

Recognized existing implementations:
- DIAL-7rm: Status command with device detection, JSON output, watch mode
- DIAL-dax: Config CLI with get/set/reset/show/path subcommands
- DIAL-blk: 85 unit tests across all core modules
